def positive_success_and_failure_paths_use_inconsistent_structured_log_keys():
    rule_id = "success_and_failure_paths_use_inconsistent_structured_log_keys"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag logging paths that use different keys for the same concept."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
